title: label-map
description: Maps commit-prefix scopes and types to GitHub label names. Consumed by agent skills, CI tooling, and any script that needs to translate commit conventions into label operations.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor support.

types.description: Maps commit-type prefix (e.g., `feat`) to GitHub label name (e.g., `feature`).

scopes.description: Maps commit-scope prefix (e.g., `audit`) to GitHub label name (e.g., `scope:audit`).
